questions.question: What are the specific property maintenance requirements for residents regarding weeds?
questions.answer: Residents are required to ensure that their property does not contain harmful flora or fauna, or poisonous or harmful weeds or plants that are likely to spread to other properties, cause destruction or damage to trees or shrubs, or create a potential hazard or public nuisance. If such conditions exist, it is the duty of the property owner to destroy or cause to be destroyed these harmful elements (§ 281-14, § 281-15).
